items.description: Load up the car and head East toward Zurich and Chur. The drive is roughly 4 hours to first major stop.
notes: Road is 400KM, check for gas stations along the way if needed
Pack coffee and snacks for the drive

items.description: One of Switzerland's most dramatic fjord-like lakes. Follow the easy, paved lakeside path toward the hamlet of Betlis (45–60 mins each way).
notes: Look for parkspace alongside river. We can park closer to the falls depending on the time we have.
Bring a light rain jacket or a windbreaker. Even if it’s not raining, the "spray" from the falls at the viewing platform can be quite intense in May due to the high water volume!

items.description: Climb from the valley floor into the mountains. Landscape shifts to deep pine forests and massive limestone cliffs.
notes: Scenic drive with potential for quick photo stops at overlooks
Arrive in Flims with plenty of daylight to settle in and explore

items.description: Nestled in the Waldhaus (Forest House) district on the edge of the UNESCO World Heritage site (Tectonic Arena Sardona).
notes: Surrounded by ancient pine trees

items.description: Only option for sunday shopping, need to go by car.
notes: For other days:
Volg in Flims Dorf for quick snacks and essentials
Coop Stenna in Flims Dorf for massive hauls
Coop Pronto at gas station is backup as its open till 10pm

items.description: Casual, lively, and unpretentious. Famous for huge, thin-crust wood-fired pizzas and generous pasta portions.
notes: Good food only spot
Walking distance from camp

items.description: Cozy local favorite. Fuel up with high-quality coffee and a 'Regional Breakfast Board' featuring mountain cheeses.
Flims Waldhaus → Caumasee → Conn → Crestasee → Flims Waldhaus. Easy, well-maintained forest paths.
notes: Ancient Flims rockslide area
Pack swimwear and towels

items.description: Deep vibrant turquoise water fed by underground springs. Bracing and incredibly refreshing (approx 15°C).
notes: Swim toward the small island in the center

items.description: Triangular viewing platform 400 meters directly above the Rhine river. Known as the 'Swiss Grand Canyon'.
notes: White limestone cliffs
Winding river views

items.description: Rustic forest lodge. Famous for 'Trinser Birnenravioli' (Pear Ravioli)—sweet pear filling with salty butter, cinnamon, and bacon.
notes: Accessible only by foot or horse carriage

items.description: Smaller and shallower than Caumasee. Very peaceful. The water is so clear you can see the trout swimming at the bottom.
notes: Warms up faster in the afternoon sun

items.description: Romantic evening in a traditional Alpine building with high wood ceilings and candlelight. Known for generous, hearty servings.
notes: Order Capuns Sursilvans or Cordon Bleu
Hearty 'Big Portion' promise

items.description: Drive west toward the Bernese Oberland. Route passes through Chur and over the Brünig Pass with views of Lake Lungern.
notes: Check Eigergletscher Webcam before leaving
Photo op at Lake Lungern pull-outs
Target arrival at Terminal: 12:30
Selected alternative mountain road which is looking different than the day plan

items.description: Ascent via the Eiger Express gondola (15 mins) alongside the North Face. Walk the 'Eiger Walk' downhill to the mirror reservoir.
notes: Park at: Grindelwald Terminal Parkhaus
Buy tickets at Jungfrau.ch to skip lines
20-min downhill walk to Fallbodensee
Optional: walk 20-25 min more downhill if we'd like to eat lunch at Kleine Scheidegg

items.activity: (IF NOT KLEINE SCHEIDEGR) Lunch in Grindelwald
items.description: 90-minute window for a proper sit-down meal. Choose between the high-quality Market Hall at the Terminal or a 5-min drive into the Village.
notes: Last chance for mountain Rösti
Traditional Alpine vibe before leaving
Might miss the lunch window, as for many restaurants they are only open from 11:30-14:00

items.description: Strategic departure to beat the Bern rush hour and the Lausanne-Geneva evening traffic.
notes: Route: Interlaken → Bern → Geneva
Last look at Lake Brienz and Lake Thun

items.description: Home exactly on schedule. 10th Anniversary trip capped off with the most iconic mountain views in Switzerland.
